prāśita p. p. Eaten, tasted, consumed.
— taṃ
1 An offering of rice
(pb) and water to the Manes of deceased ancestors, daily obsequies to the Manes; prāśitaṃ pitṛtarpaṇaṃ  Ms. 3. 74. 
2 Eating.
